narrative:
North Ridgeville City has 25,899 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
